name: DyingNoise
short_description: Soramimi-Inspired Walking Horror GameDecipher the voices. Your survival depends on your ability to listen.
detailed_description:
As you pass through the torii gate, you hear various voices.
You will need to follow the voices and choose to either "Look Forward" or "Look Back."
If you make the wrong choice...

Thank you for visiting our store page.
We are STUDIO ASU, an independent game development team from Japan.

This game is a Japanese-themed, sound effects-driven walking horror game where "listening" is a crucial theme. You will hear manipulated voices instructing you to "look forward" or "turn around." Listen carefully, make the correct moves within the time limit, and overcome the fear.

Estimated Playtime

30-90 minutes
